layout: Stacked Cards with tables. Observed cards: 'TSDB Head Status', 'Top 10 label names with value count', 'Top 10 label names with highest memory usage' (below fold), 'Top 10 series label value counts' (below fold).

card_title.observed: Titles like 'TSDB Head Status' are plain H-tag text with NO leading icon. Compare to /status where every card title has a leading Tabler icon.
card_title.INCONSISTENCY: Card-title icon usage varies. /status: all titles have icons. /tsdb-status: no titles have icons. /flags: title has icon (per screenshot below).

table.th_style: same as /status — bold 14px system font, padding 7px 10px
table.row_border: Visible bottom border between rows (see screenshot) — Mantine Table default, not per-cell inline.

label_name_cells.INCONSISTENCY: Label names here use bare <code> (monospace, no bg, no border, no padding). On /targets and /service-discovery, the same concept (label name/value) is rendered as a FULL pill-badge with gray bg, 11px/700 font. On /flags and /config the label/flag names are rendered similarly to here (code-style) — but inconsistent ACROSS the app.
